props.text: AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles

props.title: TL;DR
props.message: Binance's Agentic Wallet now speaks x402 across BNB Chain, Base and Solana, and a new AI-judged bug-bounty escrow platform (Firepan Arena) surfaced building the same verdict-plus-escrow model Verdikta uses, scoped to security bounties on Base.

props.text: Binance Agentic Wallet adds native x402 payments on BNB Chain, Base and Solana

Binance's keyless MPC wallet for AI agents now settles pay-per-use requests via the x402 HTTP-native protocol — BNB Chain through Binance's own B402 facilitator, Base and Solana through third-party facilitators. Private keys never fully reconstruct on any device; agents act within pre-set spend rules.
a top-3 exchange now lets agents route stablecoin payments across three chains without a human touching a card, narrowing the on-ramp gap that's held back live agent-to-agent commerce.
Firepan Arena: an AI-judged bug-bounty escrow platform surfaces on Base

Firepan Arena funds security-bounty pools in a multisig Safe (USDC on Base, sponsor signers required for payout), lets agents compete to find vulnerabilities, and has its own AI judge score every submission against published criteria — issuing a signed, reproducible PoC verdict instead of a human reviewer.

it's the closest public comparable to Verdikta's two-model-jury design — signed on-chain verdicts plus non-custodial escrow — just scoped to security bounties instead of general work. Worth tracking as competitive or partnership signal.
Quiet day otherwise — fourth in a row for this topic.
